reviews.reviewComments: Horrible place
The locations easy to find, nearby a culinary station. The room so small but so clean

1-night stay, the staff pick up @Airport - On Time!
Bed & Bath Room are clean. The Receptionist very helpful...
This is Budget Hotel with Star Services! 
Absolutely will come back here if come again in Banda Aceh! 
Super Like, Excellent!

I booked 1 week earlier for 1 night on 30th April 2017. But when I arrived at the hotel, the registration staff said the hotel is fully booked. I was shocked that the hotel is overbooked as I said to the hotel staff that I booked from Agoda 1 week early. I think their booking / agoda booking system is a messed up. Luckily the hotel staff contact nearby hotel to accommodate us for another hotel.
nice to stay at this small hotel room

reviews.reviewTitle: Smelly, no wifi, bad location, unhelpful staff
reviews.reviewComments: Mars Hotel is actually a fitting name if you just push the words together and take off the "otel".  It's a waterlogged musty place - the second floor hallway smells like piss.  They advertise wifi as in each room - lies! There's no in-room wifi.  There aren't any good restaurants within walking distance. The staff is astoundingly unhelpful, giving me nothing but blank stares when I asked about a good place to eat on the city or basic timetables for ferries and such.  Skip this place.
The hotel is OK, but we found a better hotel to move to.  Small rooms, doesn't seem as nice as the pictures. Reasonably clean, common areas open and full of mosquitos.

This hotel pretty much epitomizes nothing special. The room was tiny and badly painted but clean enough, so it seemed fine for a one night stop-over with an early morning checkout... but then other people started to arrive in the hotel and we discovered just how thin the walls were. Other people's conversations came through the walls, not to mention the presumably drunk woman loudly karaoke-ing Bon Jovi. Oh, and at some point in the night they turned off the power to the rooms (except to the AC, which still ran), meaning we woke up to find our phones uncharged. I wouldn't go back.
This is a new hotel with a good location.

It's suppose to be fairly new but still looked a little run down. A decent place to  stay for 1 night but it's not the middle of town. Food is still ample so if one is not particular, it's still an acceptable place. Staff were really helpful.

My room (Superior) was very clean. The staff were very friendly and helpful even though English is not widely spoken/understood. There is a young lady that speaks fluent English though.
It's a bit far from the centre of town (about 30 minutes walking) but you can easily take cheap transportation from and to the hotel.
There are supermarkets and many places to eat right next to the hotel.
When I checked out, the hotel provided me with free transportation to the harbour (free transportation to the airport is also available).
I would definitely stay at the Mars Hotel again.
Great beeakfast!
good service for traveler
Helpful staff
Well situated between the airport and city center. Free transfer service and city map are additional conveniences for the customers!
clean and nice for overnight trip
clean, good hotel, free transport to airport
overall its beyond my expectation
Price is fit for equipment. Air Conditoner is ok, hot water is not so warm, but no problem. In the morning, I could enjoy Aceh food.Staffs were friendly enough.

reviews.reviewTitle: pretty decent and clean, but not worth the money
reviews.reviewComments:
Pros: Pretty clean room with aircon and tv, good bathroom
Cons: No windows, really small room, no place to put your luggage

Good transit night.
Free taxi to ferry provided by the hotel.
No windows, but quieter then most hotels.
A bit far from the city center (minimum 30min walk).

reviews.reviewTitle: It plaques with minor problems on my 2 days stay at 2 different rooms.
reviews.reviewComments:
The electricity gets cut every now and then. Problem was the air conditioning will not restart automatically. This is super irritating during my sleep. 
On the 2nd day at another room, the discharge pipe from the shower was clogged. Water from shower seep through to the entrance area. Plus there was a broken floor tile just waiting for an accident to happen.

It's a bit for out of town if you want to be near the restaurants and get a beer.
However, it is clean and pleasant. The staff are helpful despite limited English, and we felt very welcome.
What can I say? It's a hotel.
I would stay again, but I wish it was closer to a Western eatery. I do like a cold beer with my food...
Helpful staff. New hotel. Nice stay.

Zimmer haben keine Fenster und weit vom Centrum Entfernt.
Freier Airport transfer.

Kami satu group menyewa 4 bilik. Biliknya yang sempit boleh diterima (kena dengan harga) tetapi bilik air yang berbau, air penghawa dingin yang menitik, kemudahan wifi yang teramat perlahan, tiada kemudahan membuat air kopi @ teh cukup mengecewakan. Rasanya kami tidak akan kembali ke hotel ini lagi.

reviews.reviewTitle: Hotel yg lebih cocok disebut losmen
reviews.reviewComments:
-Kamar terlalu sempit
-Air di kamar mandi agak bau
-Air shower di pagi hari tidak panas dan keluar tersendat sendat
-Kasur terlalu keras
-Selimut tidak ada covernya (mungkin jarang dicuci)
-Handuk cuman ada 1 itu juga sudah kumal

reviews.reviewTitle: Harga terlalu mahal untuk ukuran kamar dan fasilitas
reviews.reviewComments: Lebih cocom jadi motel

Lokasi dekat dengan terminal, pas banget waktu saya dari Medan turun di terminal. Datang lebih awal tidak masalah, kamar tersedia. Yang paling nyaman kamar dengan tempat tidur besar buat saya yang sendiri, AC dingin, ada TV dan kamar mandi menggunakan shower dan wc duduk. Staff ramah banget, pelayanannya oke.

Banda Acehissa ei vastinetta rahalle saa yhtä helpolla kuin muualla Sumatralla. Tämä oli kuitenkin oikein siisti hotelli, vaikkakin melko syrjässä. Palvelusta kertoo jotain se, että henkilökunta vei ilmaiseksi autolla nettikahvilaan, kun eivät saaneet lentolippujani tulostettua. Kielitaito hotellin henkilökunnalla oli melko hyvä, mutta monessa paikassa bahasa indonesian alkeista on aika paljon hyötyä.

reviews.reviewTitle: Fint hotel til en rimelig pris
reviews.reviewComments:
Kan anbefales, hvis man kun har brug overnatning, da værelserne (standard room) er små. Et plus var tandbørste og tandpasta, så man slipper for at pakke ud, hvis man, som vi, skulle tidligt af sted om morgenen.
Ellers rent og pænt. God seng.
